case_title: LEI, XUAN QIN VS FISHER, VINCENT et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,602.21 FILED BY LEI, XUAN QIN AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, VINCENT FISHER, BETTIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-17-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-14-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER STIPULATION.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEI, XUAN QIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FISHER, VINCENT FISHER, BETTIE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.00, BETTIE FISHER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DISMISSAL OF BETTY FISHER IS AT PLATINFIFF'S REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, VINCENT FISHER, BETTIE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, VINCENT
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-05-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-17-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PARTIES' REQUEST.
